title: Q@nath #7079
definition:
Kenath = "possession"

 1) a city in Gilead east of the Jordan taken possession of by a
    certain Nobah and renamed in his own honour
nasbUsage:
Definition: Kenath = "possession"

 1) a city in Gilead east of the Jordan taken possession of by a
    certain Nobah and renamed in his own honour

    NASB:  a city E. of the Jordan
